scripts.start: USE_ANVIL=true ANVIL_RPC=http://127.0.0.1:8545 XLN_MESH_RESET_ALLOWED=1 bun runtime/orchestrator/orchestrator.ts --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 --public-ws-base-url ws://127.0.0.1:8080 --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 --db-root ./db/local/mesh --mm --custody --allow-reset --custody-port 8087 --custody-daemon-port 8088 --wallet-url https://localhost:8084/app
scripts.serve: USE_ANVIL=true ANVIL_RPC=http://127.0.0.1:8545 XLN_MESH_RESET_ALLOWED=1 bun runtime/orchestrator/orchestrator.ts --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 --public-ws-base-url ws://127.0.0.1:8080 --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 --db-root ./db/local/mesh --mm --custody --allow-reset --custody-port 8087 --custody-daemon-port 8088 --wallet-url https://localhost:8084/app
scripts.serve:dev: ./scripts/sync-contract-artifacts.sh && ./scripts/build-runtime.sh && USE_ANVIL=true ANVIL_RPC=http://127.0.0.1:8545 XLN_MESH_RESET_ALLOWED=1 bun runtime/orchestrator/orchestrator.ts --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 --public-ws-base-url ws://127.0.0.1:8080 --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 --db-root ./db/local/mesh --mm --custody --allow-reset --custody-port 8087 --custody-daemon-port 8088 --wallet-url https://localhost:8084/app
scripts.test:e2e:notify: bun runtime/scripts/run-e2e-parallel-isolated.ts --shards=1 --workers-per-shard=1 --video=on --trace=off --screenshot=only-on-failure --max-failures=1 && bash ./scripts/notify.sh 'E2E passed' 'XLN Agent' || bash ./scripts/notify.sh 'E2E failed' 'XLN Agent' 'See report' 'Basso'
scripts.test:e2e:pw: echo 'deprecated: use bun run test:e2e:parallel:isolated or bun run test:e2e:parallel:long' && exit 1
scripts.test: cd jurisdictions && echo 'ℹ️ Contract tests now run as part of deployment cycle (see deploy-contracts.sh)'
scripts.build:static: cd frontend && bun run build:static && echo '✅ Static build complete for GitHub Pages'
scripts.build:deploy: npm run build:static && echo '🚀 Ready for GitHub Pages deployment'
scripts.test:contracts:r2r: echo 'obsolete: direct unsafe R2R post-deploy script removed; use processBatch paths in e2e/scenarios'
scripts.test:governance: cd jurisdictions && npx hardhat test --grep governance
scripts.test:entity: cd jurisdictions && npx hardhat test --grep entity
scripts.check: bun run check:no-manual-delta-math && bun run check:runtime-types && cd frontend && bun run check
scripts.check:src: bun run check:derive-delta-invariants && bun run check:no-manual-delta-math && bun run check:no-active-infra-in-state-machine && bun run check:runtime-types
scripts.env:deploy: cd ./jurisdictions && npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Depository.ts  --network localhost
scripts.docs:governance: echo 'See docs/governance-architecture.md for comprehensive governance documentation'
scripts.demo: echo 'See docs/governance-architecture.md for governance demo and examples'
